jd_analysis_result.summary: Thompson Health Care is seeking enthusiastic and compassionate Personal Care Workers to join their team on a casual basis. The role involves delivering high-quality personal care to the elderly, supporting their daily living activities, and working collaboratively with the clinical team.

skill_evidence.aged care: At least 1 years experience as a personal care worker in aged care (desirable)
skill_evidence.compassion: a reliable, compassionate and professional approach
skill_evidence.personal care: Provide quality care according to the current Resident Care Plan to meet the individuals needs and enhance quality of life.
skill_evidence.customer service: Demonstrates excellence in customer service and care
skill_evidence.certificate iv in nursing: Have Certificate III or Certificate IV in Nursing (desirable)
skill_evidence.certificate iii in nursing: Have Certificate III or Certificate IV in Nursing (desirable)

responsibilities: Provide quality care according to the current Resident Care Plan to meet the individuals needs and enhance quality of life.
Assist with personal care including showering, grooming, dressing and toileting.
Support residents with mobility, transfers and daily living activities.
Assist with meals, hydration and nutritional support.
Accurately document care provided and report any changes in condition.
Communicate effectively with Registered Nurses and the broader clinical team.
Promote a positive and inclusive environment for residents and families.

honesty_guard_notes: Dropped skills with no source evidence: Showering And Bathing, Dressing And Grooming, Toileting Assistance
Flagged skills with no source evidence: Communication, Adaptability, Customer Service, Reliability, Positive Attitude, Professionalism
RFBI Concord Community Village: replaced 3 tailored bullet(s) with 6 source bullet(s)
Akala Motors Private Limited: replaced 2 tailored bullet(s) with 5 source bullet(s)
